title: Verify user login to logout journey with EULA page
scenario: Verify full user login-to-logout journey including EULA acceptance, account settings navigation, and Log In button reappearance after logout on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time (fresh install or cleared data).
2. Observe the EULA / Privacy Policy agreement screen.
3. Tap 'Accept' or 'Agree' to accept the EULA and Privacy Policy.
4. Observe the 'Up-to-Date' page (app update / readiness screen).
5. Proceed past the 'Up-to-Date' page to reach the Home screen.
6. Tap the Account icon or navigate to Account settings (Home → Account).
7. Tap 'Log In' and complete the login flow (enter credentials and sign in).
8. From the Account screen, navigate to and view the following settings pages: Color Theme, About, and General Settings.
10. Tap 'Log Out' or 'Sign Out' to log out of the account.
11. Observe the Account screen after logout.
expected: The user can complete the full login-to-logout journey: EULA is shown on first launch, accepting it leads to the Up-to-Date page, then Home. After logging in via Account settings, the user can navigate to Color Theme, About, and General Settings. After logging out, the Log In button reappears on the Account screen.
